text: Please end our misery. WE ARE IN PAIN. OUR HEADS ARE HURTING.
Wait, what is going on here? Why are you in pain?

monologue.0: You're walking deeper into the woods... What is it with these slimes? Why are they so eager to feel pain?
monologue.1: Onwards you hear a mysterious sound. It seems like someone is following you. Tread lightly!
monologue.2: The ground is shaking as you try to continue your journey through the woods. Someone is crying for their mother. What is going on?

text: PLEASE MAKE IT STOP. WE DON'T WANT TO HURT ANYONE.
This is outrageous, the slimes are normally peaceful creatures. Who is responsible for this?
This is the one who did it to 'em, my liege.
How dare you kill my younglings?! You are going to pay for that!
I didn't mean to, they were in pain. Please. I don't want to do this!

monologue.0: Defeating the mother of all slimes sure left you scarred. Hopeing to find out who did this to them, you follow the road. Until ...
monologue.1: That didn't seem to be all of them. More are coming and they seem more aggressive. Watch out!
monologue.2: The warning about this golem called Moleg sure sounded scary. Wait... Why does this rock have a mustache?

text: You'll pay for hurting our mother and our brethren.

dialogue.triggerFunctionString: //Welle 2: wenn ein slime3 schon tod ist und der andere nur noch halbes leben hat
text: You sure are strong, but Moleg the golem will avenge us and our mother for your crimes.
A golem? I thought golems were nonexistant in these lands...
Hello there young wizard. I heard you were wreaking havoc around these forest and killing the slimes. For that you must feel the wrath of Moleg
Please wait. I can explain. Can't you see that lately the creatures have been aggressive?
Nonsense! I am going to crush you!

monologue.0: After defeating Moleg the golem, word has come around that the evil goblin general is pestering these lands and its habitants. On your way to the port you encounter a goblin party.
monologue.1: More of them start to appear. They seem to have alarmed their general. Let's go!
monologue.2: You hear the sound of a warhorn. It is him. The one responsible for innocent people dying. It is time to go all out.

text: Hold right there goblin scum. Tell your general to leave these lands!
Don't tell us what to do. Give us everything you have or pay with your blood.
Wizard, we finally meet. I have orders to eliminate you. My man and I are here to take you down on behalf of the liberator.
The liberator? What are you talking about? Is he responsible for the creatures going mad? Anyways. Stop harming innocent people or I will have to end you.

monologue.0: The boat ride is finally over. On your way to find out, who this liberator is and what is causing the creatures to become mad, you enter the desert. Soon you feel like cactis are moving around. Wait, why is one of them getting closer to you?
monologue.1: That was weird. Why was it holding a spear? And why are you circled by more of them? Watch out!
monologue.2: What is going on around here? Why do these cacti look like guards? And why are they so volatile? Walking towards the depths of the desert you see someone bulky lifting weights. Why are they in the desert though?

text: WHO DARES TO DISTURB ME WHILE WORKING OUT? I AM KINGTUS AND I RULE THESE LANDS
Your highness, I am not here to cause you any harm. I am here on a quest to save the creatures from my homeland that have gotten mad.
HOHO, WELL THEN YOU HAVE TO PROVE IT BY BEATING ME
Heavens, here we go again. Bring it then.

monologue.0: After a heated and pointy battle with kingtus, he let you pass through and told you to head to the pyramid for clues that might help you solve the mystery about creatures drowning in madness. On your way some volatile cacti attack you.
monologue.1: These cacti were acting weird. As if they were controlled by something or someone. Wait why are there worms appearing out of nowhere? Be careful.
monologue.2: Below you the sand starts to sink in. They seem to have called for help. Oh dear, this is not good.

text: Who are you? On behalf of Kingtus please let me pass.
I do you one better, Where are you?
No, I do you one better, Why are you?
Tonight we dine on wizard meat boys.

monologue.0: Ah the pyramid. You finally reached your destination. After all this mess from the kingdom of cacti to Darude Sandworm and his followers. It is time to enter. But wait? What are these hissing noises?
monologue.1: After defeating the snakes you venture deeper into the pyramid just to see that there is only one room. The sarcophagus inside of it seems empty. You suddenly hear music and all you can think of dancing. What is going on?

text: Who dares to barge in here and disturb this party?
I am here to find out who is cursing these creatures? Please tell me how to stop dancing and who is behind all this mess.

monologue.0: Even around these Icy lands goblins are around. These seem much fiercer though, than the ones at home
monologue.1: A concert? In the middle of nowhere when it is freezing? How awful. Suddenly more goblins start to appear.
monologue.2: That was some interesting information about this so called liberator. Who is he? Onwards you hear someone singing weird songs that makes you want to rest. What is going on?

text: You damned wizard finally showed up. Meet your doom here and let us enjoy the beautiful voice of King Janpuff and co.
You will never beat the liberator. He frees us from you filthy humans and gives us true power and meaning. In his castle he resides and you will stand no chance against him.
A Castle? Interesting. I will have to beat King Janpuff first though, before I can proceed.
You insolent brat. You killed all of the audience. I will make you pay for that
King Janpuff, I am here to stop this mess. Please let me pass through.

monologue.0: The time has come to fight the one who is responsible for this mess. As you try entering the tower you are greeted by the goblin general. Watch out!
monologue.1: Inside the tower, ghosts start to appear out of no where. You got this!
monologue.2: This is it. You've come this far and now the time has come to confront the evil behind all of this. But the sight of what you see at the peak of the tower shocks you.

text: Wizard brat. So we finally meet again. I have been eager to kill you after our last meeting. You shall not pass.
Don't stand in my way. The liberator is the reason for innocent bloodshedding. If you won't let me pass now, I will have to kill you.
I knew it would come down to this. I don't want to explain myself but it is obvious that I am thou and thou art I.
How did it come down to this? How could you do this to the land you - NO - WE SWORE TO PROTECT?
It doesn't matter anymore. My plan is almost complete. I will liberate my past self just like they did with me.
They? Stop speaking in riddles old man.
(I need to finish this, before he can curse me.)
